    A

    AccountDashboardDTO - Class in com.wealthpro.analytics.dto
    DTO representing a combined account dashboard with performance records, risk measures, and compliance breaches.

    AnalyticsController - Interface in com.wealthpro.analytics.controller
    API contract for the Analytics-Service.

    REST controller implementation for AnalyticsController.

    AnalyticsService - Interface in com.wealthpro.analytics.service
    Service interface defining all analytics business operations: performance calculations, risk assessments, compliance breach detection and lifecycle.
    AnalyticsServiceApplication - Class in com.wealthpro.analytics
    Main application class for the Analytics-Service.
    AnalyticsServiceApplication() - Constructor for class com.wealthpro.analytics.AnalyticsServiceApplication
     
    AnalyticsServiceImpl - Class in com.wealthpro.analytics.service
    Implementation of AnalyticsService containing simulated core business logic for: Daily and monthly return calculations Risk assessment (volatility, drawdown, VaR, tracking error) Compliance breach detection and lifecycle management
    AnalyticsServiceImpl(PerformanceRecordRepository, RiskMeasureRepository, ComplianceBreachRepository, ModelMapper) - Constructor for class com.wealthpro.analytics.service.AnalyticsServiceImpl

    runComplianceScan(Long) - Method in interface com.wealthpro.analytics.service.AnalyticsService
    Run a compliance scan detecting CONCENTRATION, EXPOSURE_LIMIT, and RESTRICTED_SECURITY violations using simulated rules.

    Run a compliance scan detecting CONCENTRATION, EXPOSURE_LIMIT, and RESTRICTED_SECURITY violations using simulated rules.

    runRiskAssessment(Long) - Method in class com.wealthpro.analytics.controller.AnalyticsControllerImpl
     
    runRiskAssessment(Long) - Method in interface com.wealthpro.analytics.service.AnalyticsService
    Run a full risk assessment — calculates VOLATILITY, MAX_DRAWDOWN, VAR_95, and TRACKING_ERROR using simulated data.
    runRiskAssessment(Long) - Method in class com.wealthpro.analytics.service.AnalyticsServiceImpl
    Run a full risk assessment — calculates VOLATILITY, MAX_DRAWDOWN, VAR_95, and TRACKING_ERROR using simulated data.
